DESCRIPTION: Gain #b1 stack for every #b3 Focus lost. NL Your single-target #yAttacks are split into #b(1 #y+ #yStacks) hits.
Your Fragmentation attacks now trigger their card effects.
At the start of your turn, lose #b1 #yFocus. NL Each hit of your #yFragmentation attacks grants #yBlock equal to this amount.
Empty: Evoke to draw 1 card. At the end of your turn, store a card. NL Loaded: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to the stored card's cost. Evoke to play it for free.
